series_metadata.series_title: Application and Receipt of Inspection of Salvage/Self-assembled inspections
series_metadata.series_description: To provide a record of those vehicles presented for salvage and/or self-assembled inspections. Forms: HP-105, HP-106, HP-106F

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: HP-106, Vehicle Identity Inspection – Source documentation be retained five (5) years, current ; Paper: Upon purchase from customer, BASS system produces HP-105, Receipt Salvage Inspection. calendar year current and
